-- Total Customers
SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total_Customers
FROM customers;

-- Churn Count
SELECT Churn, COUNT(*)
FROM customers
GROUP BY Churn;

-- Contract Analysis
SELECT Contract, COUNT(*)
FROM customers
GROUP BY Contract;

-- Average Monthly Charges
SELECT AVG(MonthlyCharges)
FROM customers;

-- Internet Service Analysis
SELECT InternetService, COUNT(*)
FROM customers
GROUP BY InternetService;
